description: Clean V60 recipe with all core fields — pasted text
sourceText:
James Hoffmann's Ultimate V60 Technique

Recipe:
- 15g coffee, medium-fine grind
- 250g water at 100°C
- V60 dripper with paper filter

Steps:
1. Bloom: Pour 50g of water, wait 45 seconds
2. First pour: Slowly pour to 150g over 30 seconds
3. Second pour: Pour to 250g over 30 seconds
4. Swirl gently and let it draw down

Target brew time: 3:00-3:30
